import { Button, Input, Toast, Dialog, Sidebar, MainPanel, SettingsPanel, CommandPalette, NotificationHub, useUIStore } from './index.ts'; // Window API for test assertions window.lastClickedButton = null; window.lastInputValue = ''; window.dialogConfirmed = false; // Initialize toast container const toastContainer = document.getElementById('toast-container'); const toastContainerElement = Toast.createContainer(); if (toastContainer) { toastContainer.parentNode.replaceChild(toastContainerElement, toastContainer); toastContainerElement.id = 'toast-container'; toastContainerElement.setAttribute('data-testid', 'toast-container'); } // Initialize notification hub const notificationHubContainer = document.getElementById('notification-hub-container'); const hub = NotificationHub.create(); if (notificationHubContainer) { notificationHubContainer.appendChild(hub); } // Style applied inputs const styleInputs = (container) => { const inputs = container.querySelectorAll('input'); inputs.forEach((input) => { input.style.cssText = ` padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background-color: var(--input-bg); color: var(--text); font-size: 14px; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.2s; width: 200px; `; input.addEventListener('focus', () => { input.style.borderColor = 'var(--accent)'; input.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 2px var(--accent-dim)'; }); input.addEventListener('blur', () => { input.style.borderColor = 'var(--border)'; input.style.boxShadow = 'none'; }); input.addEventListener('input', (e) => { window.lastInputValue = e.target.value; }); }); }; // Style buttons const styleButtons = (container) => { const buttons = container.querySelectorAll('button'); buttons.forEach((button) => { if (button.id && button.id.startsWith('btn-')) { button.style.cssText = ` padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; opacity: 1; font-family: inherit; `; const variant = button.getAttribute('data-variant') || 'primary'; const variants = { primary: ` background-color: var(--accent); color: var(--bg); `, secondary: ` background-color: var(--panel); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid var(--border); `, danger: ` background-color: var(--red); color: white; `, }; button.style.cssText += variants[variant]; button.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { button.style.opacity = '0.8'; }); button.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { button.style.opacity = '1'; }); button.addEventListener('click', () => { window.lastClickedButton = button.textContent; }); } }); }; styleButtons(document); styleInputs(document); // Toast button handlers document.getElementById('btn-success-toast')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'success-' + Date.now(), text: 'Operation completed successfully!', type: 'success', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }); document.getElementById('btn-error-toast')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'error-' + Date.now(), text: 'An error occurred. Please try again.', type: 'error', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }); document.getElementById('btn-info-toast')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'info-' + Date.now(), text: 'Here is some useful information.', type: 'info', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }); document.getElementById('btn-warning-toast')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'warning-' + Date.now(), text: 'Warning: This action requires attention.', type: 'warning', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }); // NotificationHub button handlers document.getElementById('btn-success-notif')?.addEventListener('click', () => { hub.success('Success', 'Operation completed successfully!'); }); document.getElementById('btn-error-notif')?.addEventListener('click', () => { hub.error('Error', 'An error occurred. Please try again.'); }); document.getElementById('btn-info-notif')?.addEventListener('click', () => { hub.info('Info', 'Here is some useful information.'); }); document.getElementById('btn-warning-notif')?.addEventListener('click', () => { hub.warning('Warning', 'Warning: This action requires attention.'); }); // Dialog button handlers document.getElementById('btn-confirm-dialog')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const dialog = Dialog.create({ title: 'Confirm Action', message: 'Are you sure you want to proceed with this action?', confirmText: 'Confirm', cancelText: 'Cancel', type: 'confirm', onConfirm: () => { window.dialogConfirmed = true; const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'confirm-' + Date.now(), text: 'Action confirmed!', type: 'success', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, onCancel: () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'cancel-' + Date.now(), text: 'Action cancelled.', type: 'info', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, }); document.body.appendChild(dialog); }); document.getElementById('btn-alert-dialog')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const dialog = Dialog.create({ title: 'Alert', message: 'This is an important alert message.', confirmText: 'OK', type: 'alert', onConfirm: () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'alert-' + Date.now(), text: 'Alert acknowledged!', type: 'info', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, }); document.body.appendChild(dialog); }); // Layout component handlers const layoutContainer = document.getElementById('layout-container'); document.getElementById('btn-sidebar')?.addEventListener('click', () => { if (layoutContainer) { layoutContainer.innerHTML = ''; const sidebar = Sidebar.create(); layoutContainer.appendChild(sidebar); } }); document.getElementById('btn-main-panel')?.addEventListener('click', () => { if (layoutContainer) { layoutContainer.innerHTML = ''; const mainPanel = MainPanel.create(); layoutContainer.appendChild(mainPanel); } }); document.getElementById('btn-settings-panel')?.addEventListener('click', () => { if (layoutContainer) { layoutContainer.innerHTML = ''; const settingsPanel = SettingsPanel.create(); layoutContainer.appendChild(settingsPanel); } }); document.getElementById('btn-command-palette')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const palette = CommandPalette.create({ commands: [ { id: 'cmd-new-chat', label: 'New Chat', description: 'Start a new conversation', category: 'Chat', icon: '💬', onSelect: () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'cmd-' + Date.now(), text: 'New chat started!', type: 'success', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, }, { id: 'cmd-open-file', label: 'Open File', description: 'Open a file from repository', category: 'File', icon: '📁', onSelect: () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'cmd-' + Date.now(), text: 'File dialog opened', type: 'info', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, }, { id: 'cmd-settings', label: 'Settings', description: 'Open settings', category: 'General', icon: '⚙️', onSelect: () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'cmd-' + Date.now(), text: 'Settings opened', type: 'info', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, }, { id: 'cmd-search', label: 'Search', description: 'Search in repository', category: 'File', icon: '🔍', onSelect: () => { const toast = Toast.create({ id: 'cmd-' + Date.now(), text: 'Search initiated', type: 'info', duration: 3000, onRemove: (id) => { document.getElementById(id)?.remove(); }, }); toastContainerElement.appendChild(toast); }, }, ], onClose: () => { // Command palette closed }, }); document.body.appendChild(palette); });
